_meta.notes: Country water risk scores from WRI Aqueduct 4.0 (Aug 2023 release). 5 indicators per country: baseline water stress, baseline water depletion, drought risk, riverine flood risk, coastal flood risk. Each indicator has a 0-5 continuous score and a -1 to 4 categorical bucket (-1 = arid/no data, 0 = Low, 4 = Extremely High). Covered 0 countries. Aqueduct refreshes every 3-5 years upstream.
